sources.title: Pursuit 1972
sources.description: A political convention; an extremist and nerve gas are the ingredients for a race against time for government agents.

metadata.Plot: Detective Breslin crosses paths with Calloway, a ruthless hacker who's trying to save his kidnapped wife from a drug cartel. When Calloway escapes from police custody, Breslin joins forces with a no-nonsense cop to reclaim his prisoner.
metadata.Writer: Brian Skiba, Andrew Stevens, Dawn Bursteen
metadata.Actors: Emile Hirsch, Jake Manley, Elizabeth Faith Ludlow
